# 4096 Weighted Nexus Lattice

## Purpose

This atlas materializes pass 6 as a full `4096`-point nexus surface.

Address form:

`Nexus(NodePair, Dimension, Operation, Surface, Lens)`

Example:

`N11-C-R-Mf-Cl` = the cloud-weighted manifest nexus for a crystal-knot chamber repair fiber

## Zero Point

The `4096` lattice says every cross-connection can now be stored as a precise weighted nexus object. The organism becomes deeper because touchpoints themselves become memory-bearing tissue.
